privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting the time to 15:00 UTC and confirming the London observer position (latitude ~0.8990 rad, longitude ~-0.0023 rad) within Stellarium, capturing screenshots to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium, and recording the schedule details in the log file at /home/ga/Desktop/eme_sked_nov15.txt. The environment simulates real astronomical mechanics and does not rely on synthetic injected datasets.
